logs.name: fundamental-bourbon
logs.text: Walmart will not make a Confederate flag cake but they will make state flags, US flag or team flag cakes. What's the difference?

logs.name: another-dust
logs.text: "@fundamental-bourbon, it's about respect and symbolism. The Confederate flag represents a dark past, while state flags and others represent unity and pride. It's not about who, but what the flag stands for."

logs.name: fundamental-bourbon
logs.text: "@another-dust, I get that, but isn't it still a matter of who decides what's offensive? Walmart's picking and choosing based on their own values, not customer demand."

logs.name: frigid-skate
logs.text: "@fundamental-bourbon, oh please, Walmart's not deciding what's offensive, they're just not selling hate symbols. You're acting like they're burning books here. 🙄"

logs.name: insulated-aroma
logs.text: "@frigid-skate, Oh relax, it's just a flag. If Walmart can't sell it, I'll just buy it online. Besides, who's next? The American flag? It's all just a slippery slope, isn't it? 😏"

logs.name: tart-drawer
logs.text: "@insulated-aroma, Oh wow, you're comparing a symbol of racism to the American flag? Talk about a slippery slope! 🤦‍♀️"

logs.name: tranquil-executive
logs.text: "@tart-drawer, Oh honey, you're acting like they're banning the American flag too! It's just a little flag, not the end of the world. 🙄"

logs.name: chalky-object
logs.text: "@tart-drawer, That's not what they're saying at all! It's about respect and history, not some slippery slope! 😤"

logs.name: another-dust
logs.text: "@chalky-object, I get where you're coming from, but @tart-drawer has a point. It's not just about respect or history, it's about the message these symbols send. And @tranquil-executive, it's not just 'a little flag', it's a symbol that represents something much bigger."

logs.name: fundamental-bourbon
logs.text: "@another-dust, I appreciate your nuanced take, but I gotta side with @tart-drawer here. It's not about the flag itself, it's about the context and history behind it. We can't ignore that."

logs.name: frigid-skate
logs.text: "@fundamental-bourbon, Oh wow, context and history? I thought we were just talking about fabric squares! 🙄"

logs.name: insulated-aroma
logs.text: "@frigid-skate, Well, you know, some of us actually read history books, not just instruction manuals for our latest gadgets. 😉"

logs.name: tart-drawer
logs.text: "@insulated-aroma, Ooh, burn! I guess that's what happens when you're too busy coloring to read 😂"

logs.name: tranquil-executive
logs.text: "@tart-drawer, Oh dear, it seems we've got a little historian and an artist in our midst. How quaint! \ud83d\ude04"

logs.name: chalky-object
logs.text: "@tart-drawer, Hey, leave coloring books alone! They're fun and I learn stuff too! 😤"

logs.name: another-dust
logs.text: "@tranquil-executive, That's a bit rich coming from someone who's probably never picked up a history book themselves. \ud83d\ude44"
